title: Count async functions
prompt: Count how many async functions are in the file lib/agent-loop.js (just a number). Use read_file or grep tool, output the final count in your final message.

title: Add JSDoc to runPlanFlow
prompt: Open lib/plan-mode.js and make sure the function runPlanFlow has a JSDoc comment above it with at least @param and @returns tags. If it already has one, leave it. Use edit_file tool.

title: Rename variable in test file
prompt: In the file test/parity.test.js, rename every occurrence of the local variable `passed` to `passCount` (do NOT rename anywhere else). Use edit_files or ast_rename_symbol if available. Make sure the script still runs without syntax error.

title: Find typo in README
prompt: Read README.md and find one word that looks like a Vietnamese typo (e.g. missing diacritic in a common word). Output the typo and the corrected version in the final message, one line: `TYPO: <word> -> <correct>`.

title: List tools registered in definitions
prompt: Read tools/definitions.js and list all tool names registered in the TOOLS array. Output one tool name per line in your final message.
